gold: À. Số điện thoại sai rồi. Số điện thoại đó không đúng.

werNormalizedGold: a so dien thoai sai roi so dien thoai do khong dung
werNormalizedPredicted: o so dien thoai sai roi so dien thoai so dien thoai no khong dung

sigWerErrors.reason: 'a' and 'o' are different words in Vietnamese and can change the meaning of the sentence, potentially confusing the subject of the sentence.
The extra 'so' (number) is redundant but does not change the overall meaning of the sentence.
